steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says that even designers who value historical accuracy will often include contemporary design elements that do not fit the historical period.

Choice D shows a designer who aimed for historical accuracy but later saw 1980s fashion influence, which is an unintentional contemporary element.
The other three choices discuss accessories, describe flexibility as necessary, or insist on strict period accuracy, none of which reveal an unintentional mix of modern style.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
